RelicConfig_BombaInfernale._localizedDescription: Instantly vaporise all enemies on the first floor of a dungeon you have previously cleared.

RelicConfig_DeckBox._localizedDescription: A simple box to hold a deck of cards.  Nobody should travel outside of the Village without one of these!

RelicConfig_FccPamphlet._localizedDescription: Crawlers help you in combat when you play their corresponding colored cards.

RelicConfig_GemHammer._localizedDescription: Unlocks the ability to add Gems to Cards.\nFind Gems in chests or when levelling up.

RelicConfig_GrimGrimoire._localizedDescription: Adds a list of discovered weapon evolutions and unions to the Pause menu.

RelicConfig_GuidingLight._localizedDescription: Shows breakable light sources on the minimap.

RelicConfig_InnKey._localizedDescription: A rusty old key for the Gorton Bell Inn. The hippest place in town to {:color(Relic):recruit new {GlobalKeywords.Crawlers} to take into combat}, or just a nice place to grab a pint of milk.

RelicConfig_MilkyWayMap._localizedDescription: Shows enemy positions and more on the mini map.

RelicConfig_Overkill._localizedDescription: Keep attacking defeated bosses to earn coins.

RelicConfig_PancakeOfPower._localizedDescription: Play cards in ascending {0} {:color(Mana):{GlobalKeywords.Mana} cost} order for a Combo Multiplier.

RelicConfig_Polentir._localizedDescription: Unlocks the Fortune Teller's {GlobalKeywords.Arcana} tent in the {GlobalKeywords.Village}.

RelicConfig_PossessedSneakers._localizedDescription: Auto navigate through the dungeon towards a boss.

RelicConfig_RageVirus._localizedDescription: Large Damage buff and autoplay all cards.

RelicConfig_Randomizer._localizedDescription: Randomize your starter deck and all cards you gain in a dungeon.

RelicConfig_Rilevatore._localizedDescription: Show how weapons will affect targets.  Plus, you look hella cool wearing them.  Instant rizz!

RelicConfig_SorcerersTears._localizedDescription: Adds a Hurry button to the World Map.

RelicConfig_YellowSign._localizedDescription: Shows full map on Pause menu including enemies, secret areas, items etc.
